name: MACHO DE PON! for Steam
short_description: As a trainer, manage the schedule and prepare training equipment to develop your macho protégé for the national bodybuilding competition. In the tournament, strike rhythmic poses and aim for victory! Play the legendary macho game known to the select few on Steam! Now, let's get macho!
detailed_description:
Thank you for your patience! It’s the era where every household gets a macho!

Raise a macho with an adorable face on the big screen! Show off the macho you’ve lovingly trained to everyone! Release your daily stress with a rhythmic macho! Before working on your own muscles, let’s do some mental training!

Yes, the macho is always right there beside you.

What is Macho de Pon?

You play as a trainer of a character who admires bodybuilders, with the goal of helping them win the national bodybuilder championship that takes place in 10 days. In other words, it’s a game where you bulk up, strike muscle poses for the judges, and earn high scores.

Features:

  • Enjoy regulated routines combining rhythm game elements and skill commands.

  • Create your own performance by combining skill commands to rapidly show off the charm of muscles in a free-style performance.

  • Compete for the top spot in the rankings and challenge players across the country with your muscular strength!

  • Over 100 different face parts for your character and a wide variety of pants to equip!

Basic Strategy Tips:

As a pro trainer, you must create a training plan that will ensure victory in 10 days. Sometimes, earning money through side jobs instead of training may be necessary to purchase equipment and protein. This game will test your ability to produce success!

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese
